articles.title: REPORT: NEW DATA ON NAVIGATING THE AI ADOPTION GAP
articles.summary: Around 2 out of 3 executives say generative AI adoption has created tension — 42% say it's tearing their company apart. For many enterprises, conflicts, silos, and even sabotage are stalling progress. Yet there's reason for optimism: 77% of employees using AI are, or could become, an AI champion.

articles.title: Read the full report for more insights and takeaways.
AMAZON NOVA ACT
articles.summary: Amazon has introduced Nova Act, an AI model that allows agents to perform tasks within web browsers. A research preview SDK is available. The SDK helps developers create agents to execute complex, multi-step tasks by breaking them down into atomic commands and enabling browser manipulation for improved reliability. Nova Act aims to expand agent capabilities beyond simple tasks covered by APIs, enhancing business productivity and task automation.

articles.title: RUNWAY'S NEW VIDEO MODEL
articles.summary: Runway has released its next-generation video model, which excels at prompt adherence and cinematic motion generation.

articles.title: OPENAI TO RELEASE AN OPEN WEIGHT MODEL
articles.summary: OpenAI is soliciting feedback for an open weight model that has reasoning.

articles.title: VIDEO GENERATION FAITHFULNESS BENCHMARK
articles.summary: A benchmark to determine how faithful video generation is to the prompt given. It also proposes methods to encourage model generation quality with respect to the user's input prompt.

articles.title: UNLEARNING SENSITIVE CONTENT FROM LLMS
articles.summary: This paper proposes a model merging technique to selectively forget sensitive content in LLMs while preserving general knowledge.

articles.title: OPTIMAL STEPSIZE IN DIFFUSION MODELS
articles.summary: Optimal Stepsize for Diffusion Sampling (OSS) optimizes sampling in diffusion models by learning efficient stepsize schedules through dynamic programming. It achieves 10x speedup while preserving nearly full generation quality.

articles.title: INVEST IN THE AI BOOM WITH GPU-POWERED SUPERCOMPUTERS
articles.summary: InfraHub Compute lets private investors own income-generating GPUs—an opportunity once exclusive to Big Tech. With a 4-YEAR TRACK RECORD, 3-4% MONTHLY REVENUE, and REAL-TIME EARNINGS MONITORING, it's a hands-off way to invest in AI infrastructure.

articles.title: 🔹Limited capacity. Learn how to get in early →
SAMWISE VIDEO SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: This work gives SAM 2 open vocabulary segmentation and more precise semantic tracking over long videos.

articles.title: ORPHEUS
articles.summary: Orpheus is a text-to-speech system. It is easy to install and runs without a GPU, similar to Llama cpp.

articles.title: VIDEO-R1
articles.summary: Video-R1 introduces a rule-based RL approach for video reasoning using a temporal variant of GRPO and new datasets. It can be trained efficiently on 4 H20 or 5 A100 GPUs.

articles.title: FAST TEXT-TO-3D
articles.summary: Using Progressive Rendering Distillation to train 3D generators from text prompts without ground-truth meshes generates high-quality 3D meshes in 1.2 seconds and outperforms prior methods.

articles.title: TIDE FOR UNDERWATER SCENE UNDERSTANDING
articles.summary: A text-to-image and dense annotation generation method for underwater scenes that enables high-quality synthetic datasets with consistent pixel-level labels.

articles.title: EARTH AI'S ALGORITHMS FOUND CRITICAL MINERALS IN PLACES EVERYONE ELSE IGNORED
articles.summary: Earth AI has discovered promising mineral deposits in previously overlooked regions of Australia using AI-driven analysis. Unlike traditional methods, Earth AI's technology scans large areas rapidly to identify potential sites for minerals like copper and cobalt. This innovative approach highlights a shift in mining towards leveraging AI for more efficient exploration.

articles.title: QUORA'S POE LAUNCHES ITS MOST AFFORDABLE SUBSCRIPTION PLAN FOR $5/MONTH
articles.summary: Quora's chatbot app, Poe, launched new subscription plans at $5/month for 10,000 daily points and $250/month for 12.5 million points.

articles.title: NVIDIA'S AI ASSISTANT IS HERE TO OPTIMIZE YOUR GAMING PC
articles.summary: Nvidia's Project G-Assist is a real AI assistant for RTX GPU owners that optimizes game settings, measures frame rates, and controls accessory lighting.

articles.title: NVIDIA IS REPORTEDLY IN TALKS TO ACQUIRE LEPTON AI
articles.summary: Nvidia is in talks to acquire server rental company Lepton AI for several hundred million dollars.
